description: A disaster response coordinator needs to preprocess a satellite image. Using the Landsat multispectral GeoTIFF located at /home/ga/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif, extract a spatial subset from Scene start (0, 0) to Scene end (200, 200) including all bands. Reproject the subset to WGS 84 (EPSG:4326). Save the processed product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_projects/landsat_subset_wgs84.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/landsat_subset_wgs84.tif.
